title: PotatoSaladPack
description: Simple resourcepack replacing baked potato with potato salad
body:
## The ultimate christmas side dish resource pack!

This pack turns the **baked potato** into a juicy potato salad

Goes well with my other pack - [řízek](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rizekpack)!

![photo of the item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HuKu9PWH/images/d16b7e06791cd8d31dc53158e6247e372a11f3ed.png)
